_comment: Gen 1 Pokemon species base stats. 20 families, ~51 total species. Stats range: Low (20-45), Medium (50-65), High (70-85), Very High (90-130)

Bulbasaur.description: A strange seed was planted on its back at birth. The plant sprouts and grows with this Pokemon.

Ivysaur.description: When the bulb on its back grows large, it appears to lose the ability to stand on its hind legs.

Venusaur.description: The plant blooms when it is absorbing solar energy. It stays on the move to seek sunlight.

Charmander.description: The flame on its tail shows the strength of its life force. If it is weak, the flame also burns weakly.

Charmeleon.description: It lashes about with its tail to knock down its foe. It then tears up the fallen opponent with sharp claws.

Charizard.description: It spits fire that is hot enough to melt boulders. It may cause forest fires by blowing flames.

Squirtle.description: It shelters itself in its shell, then strikes back with spouts of water at every opportunity.

Wartortle.description: Its tail is large and covered with a rich, thick fur. It is said to store power in its tail for swimming.

Blastoise.description: It crushes its foe under its heavy body to cause fainting. In a pinch, it will withdraw inside its shell.

Caterpie.description: Its short feet are tipped with suction pads that enable it to tirelessly climb slopes and walls.

Metapod.description: Even though it is encased in a sturdy shell, the body inside is tender. It can't withstand a harsh attack.

Butterfree.description: It has a superior ability to search for delicious honey from flowers. It can seek, extract, and carry honey.

Pidgey.description: A common sight in forests and woods. It flaps its wings at ground level to kick up blinding sand.

Pidgeotto.description: Very protective of its sprawling territorial area, this Pokemon will fiercely peck at any intruder.

Pidgeot.description: This Pokemon flies at Mach 2 speed, seeking prey. Its large talons are feared as wicked weapons.

Rattata.description: Bites anything when it attacks. Small and very quick, it is a common sight in many places.

Raticate.description: Its hind feet are webbed. They act as flippers, so it can swim in rivers and hunt for prey.

Pichu.description: Despite its small size, it can zap even adult humans. However, if it does so, it also surprises itself.

Pikachu.description: Whenever it comes across something new, it blasts it with a jolt of electricity. If you come across a blackened berry, it was zapped by this Pokemon.

Raichu.description: If the electrical sacs become excessively charged, it plants its tail in the ground to discharge.

Vulpix.description: At the time of its birth, it has just one snow-white tail. The tail splits from its tip as it grows older.

Ninetales.description: Very smart and very vengeful. Grabbing one of its many tails could result in a 1000-year curse.

Oddish.description: During the daytime, it keeps its face buried in the ground. At night, it wanders around sowing its seeds.

Gloom.description: The fluid that oozes from its mouth isn't drool. It is a nectar that is used to attract prey.

Vileplume.description: The larger its petals, the more toxic pollen it contains. Its big head is heavy and hard to hold up.

Growlithe.description: A Pokemon with a loyal nature. It will remain motionless until it is given an order by its trainer.

Arcanine.description: A Pokemon that has been admired since the past for its beauty. It runs agilely as if on wings.

Machop.description: It trains by lifting rocks in the mountains. It can even pick up a Graveler with ease.

Machoke.description: Its muscular body is so powerful, it must wear a power-save belt to be able to regulate its motions.

Machamp.description: It is impossible to defend against punches and chops doled out by its four arms.

Gastly.description: Almost invisible, this gaseous Pokemon cloaks the target and puts it to sleep without notice.

Haunter.description: Its tongue is made of gas. If licked, its victim starts shaking constantly until death eventually comes.

Gengar.description: On the night of a full moon, if shadows move on their own and laugh, it must be Gengar's doing.

Psyduck.description: It is constantly wracked by a headache. When the headache turns intense, it begins using mysterious powers.

Golduck.description: It appears by water at dusk. It may use telekinetic powers if its forehead glows mysteriously.

Magikarp.description: Famous for being very unreliable. It can be found swimming in seas, lakes, rivers and shallow puddles.

Gyarados.description: Once it begins to rampage, a Gyarados will burn everything down, even in a harsh storm.

Eevee.description: Its genetic code is irregular. It may mutate if it is exposed to radiation from element stones.

Vaporeon.description: It prefers beautiful shores. With cells similar to water molecules, it can melt invisibly in water.

Jolteon.description: It accumulates negative ions in the atmosphere to blast out 10000-volt lightning bolts.

Flareon.description: It stores some of the air it inhales in its internal flame sac, which heats it to over 3000 degrees.

Espeon.description: By reading air currents, it can predict things such as the weather or its foe's next move.

Umbreon.description: When darkness falls, the rings on the body begin to glow, striking fear in the hearts of anyone nearby.

Leafeon.description: When you see Leafeon asleep in a patch of sunshine, you'll know it is using photosynthesis to produce clean air.

Glaceon.description: It can control its body temperature at will. It freezes the surrounding air and creates diamond dust.

Scyther.description: With ninja-like agility and speed, it can create the illusion that there is more than one of it.

Electabuzz.description: Electricity runs across the surface of its body. In darkness, its entire body glows a whitish blue.

Dratini.description: It is called the Mirage Pokemon because so few have seen it. Its shed skin has been found.

Dragonair.description: A mystical Pokemon that exudes a gentle aura. It is said to have the ability to change the weather.

Dragonite.description: It is said to make its home somewhere in the sea. It guides crews of shipwrecks to shore.

Mewtwo.description: A Pokemon created by recombining Mew's genes. It's said to have the most savage heart among Pokemon.

Mew.description: When viewed through a microscope, this Pokemon's short, fine, delicate hair can be seen.
